summary: Completed comprehensive testing of police overtime roster application. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend mostly working with minor UI interaction issues.

data_issues.description: Multiple seed operations creating duplicate officer records
data_issues.impact: Officers appear multiple times in admin panel and dropdowns

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay interception preventing clicks on officer selection dropdowns
ui_bugs.workaround: Force clicks work but not ideal for users

ui_bugs.issue: Webpack dev server overlay intercepting clicks on reset button
ui_bugs.note: Development environment issue, may not affect production

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (Username: Admin, Password: 123456)
Invalid login shows proper error message
Dashboard loads with RDO sheet by default (6 rows, A A B B C C pattern)
Tab navigation between RDO, Days EXT (4 rows), and Nights EXT (6 rows)
Sergeant name and star input fields functional
Officer number and deployment location input fields functional
Admin panel navigation and officer list display
Add new officer functionality in Admin Panel
Edit officer functionality in Admin Panel
Delete officer functionality in Admin Panel
Export PDF button generates PDF download
Logout functionality returns to login page
All backend API endpoints (auth, officers CRUD, sheets, version logs)
Sheet structure validation (correct row counts and team patterns)

high_priority: Fix officer selection dropdown overlay interception issues - consider z-index adjustments or click event handling improvements
medium_priority: Investigate and fix duplicate officer seeding issue - ensure seed endpoint checks for existing officers properly
Fix reset button overlay issues in development environment
low_priority: Consider adding duplicate officer detection and prevention in UI
